//exclude: background-shades.tsx is the component pasted VERBATIM from the prompt (step 0). It is kept byte-for-byte as the literal copy-paste deliverable, so it is excluded from the strict typecheck: as shipped it imports PulsingBorder without using it (noUnusedLocals) and passes shape="plane", which is not a LiquidMetalShape in shaders-react@0.0.76 (none|circle|daisy|diamond|metaballs). The live app renders the reconciled wrapper in liquid-metal-foundry.tsx instead — see that file and the Integration notes dock.
